data.biography:
Kim Mi Kyung is a South Korean actress. She made her theater debut in 1985. A year later, she made her film debut and her television drama debut soon followed. One of the most recognized actresses in Korean television, she has garnered fans the world over. You can find her making appearances in numerous films and television dramas including, "The Master's Sun" (2013), “Healer” (2014), “Another Oh Hae Young” (2016), and “Her Private Life” (2019).

Kim married Park Geun Won in 1994 and they have a daughter named Park Soy.
data.name: Kim Mi-kyeong

data.biography:
Kim Mi-Kyung é uma atriz sul-coreana da Popeye Entertainment. Ela fez sua estreia no teatro em 1985. Kim é membro da companhia de teatro Yeonwoo Mudae desde 1985. Ela é mais ativa como atriz coadjuvante em dramas de televisão.

Um ano depois, ela estreou no cinema e logo em seguida sua estreia no drama televisivo. Uma das atrizes mais reconhecidas da televisão coreana, conquistou fãs em todo o mundo. Você pode encontrá-la fazendo aparições em vários filmes e dramas de televisão, incluindo “The Master’s Sun” (2013), “Healer” (2014), “Another Oh Hae Young” (2016) e “Her Private Life” (2019).

Kim se casou com Park Geun-Won em 1994 e eles têm uma filha chamada Park Soy.
金美卿（韩语：김미경，1963年10月14日—），韩国女演员，常见译名为金美京或译金美庚。因在多部热门剧中皆饰演主角的妈妈，故有“国民妈妈”之称号。
data.name: 金美卿

data.biography: 金美卿（韓語：김미경，1963 年 10 月 14 日—），韓國女演員，常見譯名為金美京或譯金美庚。因在多部熱門劇中皆飾演主角的媽媽，故有“國民媽媽”之稱號。
data.name: 金美卿

data.biography: Han Ji-wan is a South Korean actress. She is known for her drama roles in Rugal, Search: WWW and I Do, I Do.
data.name: Han Ji-Wan

data.biography:
徐敏，北京电影制片厂演员，国家一级演员，毕业于北京戏剧专科学校表演系。

1976年主演第一部电影《山花》，1980年主演沈耀庭执导电影《405谋杀案》，饰演男主角钱凯，成中国第一部票房过亿电影；1984年主演著名导演严寄洲指导的电影《破雾》，饰演男主角丁兆瑜；1997年在著名历史剧《雍正王朝》出演太子胤礽，2002年在《孝庄秘史》中饰演礼亲王代善，2003年在张黎执导的大型历史剧《走向共和》中饰演庆亲王奕劻，2011年获得全国电视工作者德艺双馨艺术家奖；2013年在《娘要嫁人》中，与蒋雯丽饰演一对父女；2014年出演《爱的妇产科》的李副院长。
data.name: 徐敏

data.biography:
徐敏，北京電影製片廠演員，國家一級演員，畢業於北京戲劇專科學校表演系。

1976 年主演第一部電影《山花》，1980 年主演沈耀庭執導電影《405 謀殺案》，飾演男主角錢凱，成中國第一部票房過億電影；1984 年主演著名導演嚴寄洲指導的電影《破霧》，飾演男主角丁兆瑜；1997 年在著名歷史劇《雍正王朝》出演太子胤礽，2002 年在《孝莊秘史》中飾演禮親王代善，2003 年在張黎執導的大型歷史劇《走向共和》中飾演慶親王奕劻，2011 年獲得全國電視工作者德藝雙馨藝術家獎；2013 年在《娘要嫁人》中，與蔣雯麗飾演一對父女；2014 年出演《愛的婦產科》的李副院長。
data.name: 徐敏

data.biography:
Jacob Adam McLaughlin (born October 7, 1982) is an American actor and former soldier and veteran. He's known for his roles as Michael Ormewood on the series Will Trent, Ryan Booth on Quantico, and William Tate on Believe.

After leaving the military, McLaughlin worked on a crab boat in Oregon and as a security guard at Universal Studios. He was living in Chico, California, doing concrete work and had only $200 in his checking account when he heard about the casting session for Paul Haggis's In the Valley of Elah.  Being a former dismount infantry S.A.W. gunner in Iraq in real life, he read for the role after hearing that Haggis was auditioning actual vets for several parts. He then starred as Specialist Gordon Bonner in the 2007 film In the Valley of Elah – based on actual events involving American soldiers who served in the Iraq War.

After the success of his first movie, McLaughlin made cameo appearances in movies such as The Day the Earth Stood Still and Cloverfield. He appeared in episodes of The Unit and CSI: Crime Scene Investigation. He got his first major role on TV in 2009, when he was cast in the television remake of the Oscar-winning film, Crash. In the following years he made many appearances on television. In 2011, he was cast in Warrior which was followed by a supporting role in Safe House.

In February 2013, McLaughlin was cast as the male lead in Believe, a television pilot by Alfonso Cuarón which was picked to series in May 2013. The show premiered on NBC in March 2014. In March 2015, he was cast in the television pilot, Quantico which was picked to series in May.
data.name: Jake McLaughlin

data.biography:
Nachdem er das Militär verlassen hatte, arbeitete McLaughlin auf einem Krabbenboot in Oregon und als Wachmann in den Universal Studios. Er lebte in Chico, Kalifornien, leistete konkrete Arbeit und hatte nur 200 Dollar auf seinem Girokonto, als er von der Casting-Session für Paul Haggis's In the Valley of Elah hörte. Da er ein ehemaliger S.A.W. Schütze der S.A.W. Infanterie im Irak im wirklichen Leben war, dachte er, er würde für die Rolle lesen, nachdem er gehört hatte, dass Haggis die tatsächlichen Veteranen für mehrere Teile vorspricht.

Nach dem Erfolg seines ersten Films trat McLaughlin in Filmen wie The Day the Earth Stood Still und Cloverfield auf. Er erschien in Episoden von The Unit und CSI: Crime Scene Investigation. Seine erste große Rolle im Fernsehen bekam er 2009, als er im Rahmen des Fernseh-Remakes des Oscar-prämierten Films Crash besetzt wurde. In den folgenden Jahren trat er mehrfach im Fernsehen auf. Im Jahr 2011 wurde er in Warrior besetzt, gefolgt von einer Nebenrolle in Safe House.

Im Februar 2013 wurde McLaughlin als männliche Hauptrolle in Believe, einem Fernsehpiloten von Alfonso Cuarón, besetzt, der im Mai 2013 in die Serie aufgenommen wurde. Die Premiere der Show auf NBC fand im März 2014 statt.

Im März 2015 wurde er in der Fernsehserie Quantico besetzt, die im Mai in die Serie aufgenommen wurde.
1982年10月7日出生于美国，美国男演员。在 2007 年电影《以拉谷》中饰演专家戈登·邦纳而受到关注，该片根据伊拉克战争中服役的美国士兵的真实事件改编。 他也曾在《实习医生格蕾》中饰演亚历克斯·卡列夫的弟弟亚伦。 麦克劳克林在 NBC 短剧《相信》中饰演泰特。
data.name: 杰克・麦克拉夫

data.biography:
1982 年 10 月 7 日出生於美國，美國男演員。在 2007 年電影《以拉谷》中飾演專家戈登·邦納而受到關注，該片根據伊拉克戰爭中服役的美國士兵的真實事件改編。

他也曾在《實習醫生格蕾》中飾演亞歷克斯·卡列夫的弟弟亞倫。

麥克勞克林在 NBC 短劇《相信》中飾演泰特。
data.name: 傑克·麥克勞克林
